case_title: CESAR AUGUSTO CANAS III VS. TIMOTHY PATRICK BYRNE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-31-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CESAR AUGUSTO CANAS II IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY BYRNE IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED A SETTLEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY 31ST HEARING, CONTINUE THE MATTER TO AUGUST 15, 2018 @ 10:00AM FOR A FINAL PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE AUGUST 15 HEARING, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-15-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES; JPT: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED; (D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,400.00 FILED BY CANAS III, CESAR AUGUSTO AS TO DEFENDANT BYRNE, TIMOTHY PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES HAD REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT A PRIOR HEARING DATE AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
